title: eulophia carinata
intro: Eulophia carinata, also known as the crested eulophia, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its roots are used to treat various ailments. The roots of Eulophia carinata are said to have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the treatment of fever, coughs, and skin conditions. In traditional medicine, the roots are often prepared into herbal teas or infusions, which can also be used to treat wounds and promote wound healing.
